properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have returned To the God of my childhood To the same simple faith As a child I once knew Like a prodigal son I longed for my loved ones For the comfort of home And the God I outgrew.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I have returned to the God of my childhood Bethlehem’s babe The Prophet Messiah He’s Jesus to me, Eternal Deity Praise His name I have returned.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I have returned To the God of my prophet The most God like man A child ever knew And I just heard a shout From the angels in glory Praise the Lord A child has come home.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I have returned To the God of my fathers Creator of heaven and earth God of the universe He’s Jesus to me, Eternal Deity Praise His name I have returned.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I have returned To Yahweh of Judah On my knees I did fall Where the wall now stands The lesson I’ve learned As I walk my way homewards The Saviour of all Is the comfort of man.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I have returned To the father of Abraham The Shepherd of Moses Who called Him the Great I Am He’s Jesus to me, Eternal Deity Praise His name I have returned

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I have returned To the God of Brother Branham On my knees I did fall Where the Word now stands, His message I’ll heed As I prepare for the rapture Praise His name I have returned.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I have returned To the God of my fathers Creator of heaven and earth God of the universe He’s Jesus to me, Eternal Deity Praise His name I have returned.
